title: Crypto Market Update: White House Teases Bitcoin Stockpile Update
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: The White House is expected to announce details of a strategic Bitcoin reserve within weeks. Patrick Witt, the lead crypto advisor, hinted at a significant deve
excerpt: The White House is expected to announce details of a strategic Bitcoin reserve within weeks. Patrick Witt, the lead crypto advisor, hinted at a significant development. This update is anticipated to impact Bitcoin's market dynamics.

content.introduction: The White House is expected to announce details of a strategic Bitcoin reserve within weeks. Patrick Witt, the lead crypto advisor, hinted at a significant development. This update is anticipated to impact Bitcoin's market dynamics.

JUST IN: White House crypto advisor Patrick Witt says a “big announcement” on a Bitcoin strategic reserve is expected within weeks. · Photo by

[Skip to main content](https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/white-house-advisor-teases-major-update-on-bitcoin-reserve-plan#main-content). [PREMIUM PRODUCTS](https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/white-house-advisor-teases-major-update-on-bitcoin-reserve-plan). [CATEGORIES](https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/white-house-advisor-teases-major-update-on-bitcoin-reserve-plan). Patrick Witt, the lead crypto adviser to the White House, recently teased an upcoming breakthrough for [President Donald Trump](https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/trumps-gold-card-was-supposed-to-raise-1-trillion-so-far-it-only-has-1-approval)’s plan to establish a strategic [Bitcoin](https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/bitcoin) (BTC) reserve. [![Image 3: U.S. President Donald Trump speaks to the media before boarding Marine One on the South Lawn of the White House on April 16, 2026.](https://www.thestreet.com/.image/ar_16:9%2Cc_fill%2Ccs_srgb%2Cfl_progressive%2Cg_faces:center%2Cq_auto:good%2Cw_640/MjIyODA2OTM5NzI4MzU3MjM4/donald-trump.jpg)](https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/trump-issues-bold-warning-on-clarity-act-to-bankers-at-white-house-dinner).
